title: Extend runtime proof across additional backend families
description: Runtime diagnosis identified a coverage gap rooted in upstream allocation and policy evidence. Expand the same auditable loop shape beyond the current backend family.
triage_notes: Opened from DG-004 runtime-generated diagnosis benchmark follow-up. A second positive proof family is now recorded through deep-path routing in `.aof/artifacts/runtime-loop-proofs/deep-path-proof.json`, so the remaining gap is no longer single-family execution evidence but stage-to-benchmark mapping and broader framing/allocation benchmark coverage before v3.1.0.
